name: digital-brain-registry-search
title: Digital Brain Registry Search
description: Search package registries (npm, RubyGems, GitHub, Homebrew, VS Code, Obsidian) and generate Obsidian software-note frontmatter or create notes directly in your vault.
author: andrewmcodes

commands.name: search-registry
commands.title: Search Registry
commands.subtitle: Digital Brain
commands.description: Search a package registry and generate software-note frontmatter.

preferences.name: vaultPath
preferences.title: Vault Path
preferences.description: Absolute path to your Obsidian vault root. Required to create notes.

preferences.name: softwareFolder
preferences.title: Software Folder
preferences.description: Folder within the vault where software notes are stored.

preferences.name: githubToken
preferences.title: GitHub Token
preferences.description: Optional personal access token to raise GitHub API rate limits (60/hr unauthenticated).
